name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea for SafeVault
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## 💭 Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🔐 Privacy Impact

How does this feature align with SafeVault's zero-knowledge, offline-first principles?

- [ ] Works fully offline
- [ ] Does not transmit any user data
- [ ] Can be disabled/opted-out if needed
- [ ] Other (please explain): ___

## 📸 Mockups

If applicable, add mockups or wireframes.

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples.
